name: com.archenemy.darkmagic
description: A tiny, DX-first Unity toolkit: V (events), S (state), W (Awaitable helpers), I (Input wrapper), X (utilities), A (animation awaitables), and U (code-first UI).

samples.description: VConfig, SConfig, WConfig, and IConfig in one folder (recommended starting point).
A ready-to-import Input Actions asset + tiny wrapper + optional bridge to I.
UConfig + example scripts for banners, dialogue, choices, and HUD display.
